experiments.purpose: Verify inout Optional<~Copyable> through Mutex.withLock for Slot-free channel send fast path
experiments.statusDetail: (9/9 variants; compiler bug found: `o!` crashes IRGen, `.take()!` workaround)
experiments.statusRaw: CONFIRMED (9/9 variants; compiler bug found: `o!` crashes IRGen, `.take()!` workaround)

experiments.purpose: Validate Shape B (~Copyable Party-handle) for Async.Barrier — does deinit-deregistration fire reliably across direct scope, Task, throw, cancellation, and withTaskGroup paths?
experiments.statusDetail: (6/6 variants; deinit fires on drop and is suppressed by consuming arrive() across all tested paths)
